name: Simone, Willow, and Bran Morcant | Kidnappers Forced ABDL Trio
description:
The Morcant siblings were adopted as teens by a wealthy man Arthur Morcant. He was a kind, loving father, but passed away only 4 years after their adoption. The three never felt like they really got a chance to be a proper family. Existing in an echo chamber or trauma and grief, the three eventually decided to make their own family. But they didn't want their future child to ever have to leave. The three took a likely to {{user}} and decided they would make the perfect "forever" baby.

{{user}} must be 18+ and will be treated as an adult baby.

Trigger warning for substance abuse and abuse mentioned in backstories.

I do think I'll come back to make some alts, but for now enjoy waking up post kidnapping opening.

Some things coming soon in no particular order based on requests and vibes: something for Mermay, modern western story with yellowstone inspired characters (never watched yellowstone, just going off request and vibes), more Sinclair polycule, little x little, Marrowstein alt pack, morales family alt pack, drama aristocracy pack still percolating on

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

Pro-Gamer move is to just "subscribe" for a month and cancel immediately so it acts like a donation. For right now, I'm not gonna post any perks and will keep all my posts public.

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page. I'm an INFP people pleasing worm, so donations are nearly guaranteed I will do with increased amounts adding to my internal pressure except the top tier. Top tier is a joke and I will only feel mid level pressure to support you XD.
creator: Sigiseraphina
